@if (formStateService.process()?.classification?.code === CatalogueGuideClassificationsCodeEnum.guide_local) { } @if (CatalogueGuideClassificationsCodeEnum.guide_local === formStateService.process()?.classification?.code || CatalogueGuideClassificationsCodeEnum.guide_adventure === formStateService.process()?.classification?.code || CatalogueGuideClassificationsCodeEnum.guide_national_adventure === formStateService.process()?.classification?.code) { }
